headline: Luxury Brands Rising Above Retail Volatility. What the Ralph Lauren, Tapestry, and Williams-Sonoma Charts Show.
summary: Luxury retail stocks have been firm, with shares of  Ralph Lauren Tapestry  and  Williams-Sonoma  leading the space as investors leaned into companies benefiting from resilient demand among higher-income consumers.  When we look at international names we see domestic names outperforming them.

headline: Dollar General names VP of supply chain optimization
summary: In addition to appointing Matt Lucas to guide improvements in the retailer's supply chain network, Kyle Gorman was promoted to VP of distribution.

headline: Williams-Sonoma: Valuation And Macroeconomic Risks Outweigh Fundamental Soundness
summary: Williams-Sonoma's Q4 2025 revenue declined 4.2% YoY, marking its first negative growth in five quarters. See why WSM stock is a Hold.
